system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Block 0 - upstream of cylinder
    (-1 -0.5 0)    // 0
    (-0.2 -0.5 0)  // 1
    (-0.2  0.5 0)  // 2
    (-1  0.5 0)    // 3

    (-0.2 -0.5 0.1)    // 4
    (-0.2  0.5 0.1)    // 5
    (-1  0.5 0.1)      // 6
    (-1 -0.5 0.1)      // 7

    // Block 1 - below cylinder
    (-0.2 -0.5 0)    // 8
    ( 0.2 -0.5 0)    // 9
    ( 0.2 -0.15 0)   // 10
    (-0.2 -0.15 0)   // 11

    (-0.2 -0.5 0.1)    // 12
    ( 0.2 -0.5 0.1)    // 13
    ( 0.2 -0.15 0.1)   // 14
    (-0.2 -0.15 0.1)   // 15

    // Block 2 - above cylinder
    (-0.2  0.15 0)   // 16
    ( 0.2  0.15 0)   // 17
    ( 0.2  0.5 0)    // 18
    (-0.2  0.5 0)    // 19

    (-0.2  0.15 0.1) // 20
    ( 0.2  0.15 0.1) // 21
    ( 0.2  0.5 0.1)  // 22
    (-0.2  0.5 0.1)  // 23

    // Block 3 - downstream of cylinder
    ( 0.2 -0.5 0)    // 24
    ( 2   -0.5 0)    // 25
    ( 2    0.5 0)    // 26
    ( 0.2  0.5 0)    // 27

    ( 0.2 -0.5 0.1)  // 28
    ( 2   -0.5 0.1)  // 29
    ( 2    0.5 0.1)  // 30
    ( 0.2  0.5 0.1)  // 31
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (30 20 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
    hex (8 9 10 11 12 13 14 15) (10 10 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
    hex (16 17 18 19 20 21 22 23) (10 20 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
    hex (24 25 26 27 28 29 30 31) (60 20 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (25 26 30 29)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (3 2 6 7)
            (19 18 22 23)
            (27 26 30 31)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
            (8 9 13 12)
            (24 25 29 28)
        );
    }
    cylinder
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (11 10 14 15)
            (16 17 21 20)
        );
    }
    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            // front faces (z=0)
            (0 1 2 3)
            (8 9 10 11)
            (16 17 18 19)
            (24 25 26 27)
            // back faces (z=0.1)
            (4 5 6 7)
            (12 13 14 15)
            (20 21 22 23)
            (28 29 30 31)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          0.0025;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|omega|epsilon)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    "(U|k|omega|epsilon)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         1;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

viscosityModel  constant;

nu              1e-03;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volVectorField;
    object      U;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (0 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.5 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 2 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    model           generalisedNewtonian;
    viscosityModel  generalisedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        CrossPowerLawCoeffs
        {
            n       3;
            m       0.4;
            nuInf   10;
        }
    }
}')]</foamfiles>
<error_logs>[{'file': 'log.pimpleFoam', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
Unknown generalisedNewtonianViscosityModel type generalisedNewtonian

Valid generalisedNewtonianViscosityModels are : 

7
(
BirdCarreau
Casson
CrossPowerLaw
HerschelBulkley
Newtonian
powerLaw
strainRateFunction
)


    From function static Foam::autoPtr<Foam::laminarModels::generalisedNewtonianViscosityModel> Foam::laminarModels::generalisedNewtonianViscosityModel::New(const Foam::dictionary&, const Foam::viscosity&, const Foam::volVectorField&)
    in file laminar/generalisedNewtonian/generalisedNewtonianViscosityModels/generalisedNewtonianViscosityModel/generalisedNewtonianViscosityModelNew.C at line 51.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<reviewer_analysis># Error Diagnosis and Resolution

## Error Analysis

The error message is:

```
Unknown generalisedNewtonianViscosityModel type generalisedNewtonian

Valid generalisedNewtonianViscosityModels are :
(
BirdCarreau
Casson
CrossPowerLaw
HerschelBulkley
Newtonian
powerLaw
strainRateFunction
)
```

This is very clear now. The OpenFOAM version being used (OpenFOAM 10, Foundation version) does **not** support `generalisedNewtonian` as a viscosity model type under the `generalisedNewtonianViscosityModel` namespace. Instead, it lists the valid models, and `CrossPowerLaw` is among them!

The problem is that the current `momentumTransport` file tries to use `generalisedNewtonian` as the viscosity model type, but this version maps the Cross-Power-Law parameters (`nuInf`, `m`, `n`) directly into the `generalisedNewtonianViscosityModel` without requiring a separate `generalisedNewtonian` wrapper.

## Proposed Solution

### Completely rewrite the `laminar` sub-dictionary in `constant/momentumTransport`

Instead of using `generalisedNewtonian` as the model and nesting `CrossPowerLawCoeffs`, place the Cross-Power-Law parameters directly at the `laminar` level so that the `generalisedNewtonianViscosityModel` can read them:

```
laminar
{
    model           CrossPowerLaw;
    CrossPowerLawCoeffs
    {
        n       3;
        m       0.4;
        nuInf   10;
    }
}
```

Key changes:
1. Change `model` from `generalisedNewtonian` to `CrossPowerLaw`
2. Remove the `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs` sub-dictionary wrapper
3. Place `n`, `m`, `nuInf` directly inside the `laminar` block as `CrossPowerLawCoeffs`

This approach bypasses the non-existent `generalisedNewtonian` viscosity model type entirely and uses `CrossPowerLaw` directly, which is listed as a valid model in the error output. The Cross-Power-Law model in OpenFOAM 10 reads the parameters `n`, `m`, and `nuInf` directly from the `CrossPowerLawCoeffs` sub-dictionary, achieving the same physical behavior as specified by the user requirement.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'constant/momentumTransport', 'changes': 'Change model from generalisedNewtonian to CrossPowerLaw; Remove the generalizedNewtonianCoeffs sub-dictionary wrapper; Place CrossPowerLawCoeffs sub-dictionary with n=3, m=0.4, nuInf=10 directly inside the laminar block'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar offsetcylinder simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm with a generalized Newtonian model and Cross-Power-Law viscosity for momentum transport, characterized by specific parameters nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 1.5m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls, including the cylinder surface. Use timestep of 0.0025 and output every 0.05. Finaltime is 0.5. use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-03 in physical properties.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
